recommendedAboutDecision.reason: The homepage needs a compact trust section, while the business also needs a richer about experience with portrait, story, mission, values, and credibility.

hero.title: Life Made Easy With CP Automation
hero.body: We provide innovative automation solutions that make your life and business easier. Automate your borehole pumps, security lights, and manual changeovers.

aboutSummary.title: About CP Automation
aboutSummary.subtitle: Taking your stress away with innovative automation solutions

missionCard.title: Our Mission
missionCard.body: At CP Automation, we have products that will make your life and that of your business easier. We automate your borehole pumps, security light switches and manual changeovers. Our aim is to take your stress away.

whyChooseUsCard.title: Why Choose Us
points: Proven track record with 120+ projects completed

servicesSection.title: Our Services
servicesSection.subtitle: Comprehensive automation solutions for residential and commercial needs

customSolutions.title: Custom Automation Solutions
customSolutions.subtitle: Need something specific? We build custom automation devices tailored to your unique requirements

developmentCard.title: Custom Device Development
developmentCard.body: We specialize in creating bespoke automation solutions for unique challenges.
points: Custom circuit design and PCB development

steps.title: Consultation
steps.body: We discuss your specific requirements and challenges

steps.title: Design & Proposal
steps.body: We create a custom solution design and provide a detailed quote

steps.title: Development
steps.body: Our team builds and tests your custom automation device

steps.title: Installation & Support
steps.body: We install the solution and provide ongoing support

contactCta.title: Ready to Automate Your Space?
contactCta.body: Contact us today to discuss how CP Automation can make your life and business easier. We offer free consultations and quotes.

products.name: CP Level Controller
products.description: Automates your borehole sump pumps to prevent water spillages. Features auto start and auto stop functionality.

products.name: CP Auto Changeover Switch
products.description: Automates your manual changeover switch and turns off your generators automatically.

products.name: CP Auto Timed Switch
products.description: Automates any electronic devices in your home and saves you power.

services.name: Installation & Setup
services.description: Professional installation of all CP Automation products with thorough testing and client training.

services.name: Technical Support
services.description: Comprehensive after-sales support and troubleshooting to ensure your automation systems run smoothly.

services.name: Custom Solutions
services.description: Tailored automation solutions designed to meet your specific residential or commercial requirements.

services.name: Maintenance
services.description: Regular maintenance services to keep your automation systems operating at peak performance.

projects.title: Timer
projects.description: Can be used to time electric cooker or any other electric device

testimonials.quote: Good afternoon, yes it is. It is such a breath of fresh air. Thank you.
testimonials.author: Satisfied CP Automation Client

testimonials.quote: Wow, CP Auto Level controller is helping clients relieve operational stress from their sump pump systems. No more water spillages.
testimonials.author: CP Automation Client Feedback

testimonials.quote: The auto changeover switch has completely eliminated our generator stress. It works perfectly every time!
testimonials.author: Business Owner

footer.tagline: Transforming Nigerian homes and businesses with innovative automation solutions that simplify your daily life.
footer.companySummary: Providing cutting-edge automation solutions for Nigerian homes and businesses since 2016. We specialize in borehole pump automation, security light controls, and power management systems.
